name: Cajun Shrimp Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 cups diced peeled and seeded tomatoes
1 pound fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined (can substitute chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté for approximately four minutes until translucent.
2. Stir in the garlic, thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and basil. Cook at low heat for five more minutes.
3. Add the diced tomatoes, sugar, green onions, chicken or shrimp stock, and cook over low heat for an hour, stirring occasionally.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the shrimp in butter until three-quarters cooked (pink but not totally opaque). Add the sauce and cook for an additional two minutes.
5. Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with the shrimp. Toss well with grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Serve hot.
